summary: Grainy older video footage with a soft, low-resolution look. It shows several men seated indoors, one wearing dark sunglasses; a close shot of a man raising a revolver against a bright background; and a man in dark sunglasses and a leather jacket being escorted at night by uniformed officers. The footage is consistent with archival television material referenced in the post.

script.scene: Several men sit indoors, one in dark sunglasses, in grainy low-resolution footage.
A close shot of a man raising a revolver against a bright background.
A man in dark sunglasses and a leather jacket is escorted at night by uniformed officers.
